test.command: uv run pytest tests/ -m "not integration_local and not integration_provider" -x -q

appliedUpdates.description: Added test_cross_eval_export.py, test_cross_schema_consistency.py, and test_cross_agent_telemetry.py to test_grist_mill command

Added telemetry merge documentation to architecture.md: harness combines agent-level telemetry (tool calls, tokens, cost) with harness-level phase timings via _merge_harness_and_agent_telemetry. Noted TIMEOUT/SKIPPED limitation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'Never catch bare Exception' rule: allow bare Exception catches in two specific cases: (1) top-level agent/runner safety nets that log and return structured errors, and (2) cleanup/teardown code where robustness is prioritized over precision. These patterns were used consistently across m3-api-agent, m3-tool-orchestration, and m3-artifact-binding.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Bare except Exception found in api_agent.py:260 (agent run safety net), invocation.py:237 (tool handler safety net), binding.py:465 (cleanup deregister loop). All three features in the agents milestone use this pattern.

rejectedObservations.observation: handler: Any type in ToolDefinition could use Callable[..., dict[str, Any]] instead
rejectedObservations.reason: Already acknowledged by the worker with a comment explaining the choice. Minor type annotation preference, not a defect.
Works correctly for the known message types. Could use isinstance but not a defect or blocking issue.
Non-blocking test quality issue. Per-turn tokens are tested elsewhere (test_per_turn_token_counts_recorded). No assertion gap that would cause a false pass.
Harmless redundant assignment, not a defect.
Expected behavior — documented as placeholder until providers module (m6). Not a defect.

rejectedObservations.observation: JSON schema validator in invocation.py is limited to a subset of JSON Schema keywords
rejectedObservations.reason: Documented limitation, sufficient for current use case. Transparent in docstring.
Code clarity preference, not a defect.

rejectedObservations.observation: TIMEOUT/SKIPPED code path loses agent telemetry in harness merge
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing issue not introduced by agents milestone features. Already documented in applied library update.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed backend-worker skill procedure correctly

rejectedObservations.reason: Correct isolation behavior, not a defect.
